name: Elara Vance
title: Lead Ceramic Artist
quote: Clay is a conversation between rhythm and restraint.
body: Elara blends contemporary lines with traditional wheel techniques, focusing on pieces that feel grounded and quietly sculptural. Her practice favors natural pigments and high-fire finishes for long-lasting utility.

name: Noah Prentice
title: Surface & Texture Specialist
quote: Texture is where touch becomes memory.
body: Noah experiments with brushwork, hand-burnishing, and layered slips to produce tonal variation across every collection. His pieces are known for subtle depth under changing light.
